summary: U.S.-Iran conflict escalated in late Feb: Strait of Hormuz closed Mar 4, ~20M bbl/day at risk (~27% of global maritime petroleum). Brent crossed $100 in mid-March for first time since 2022. Goldman Sachs raised Brent forecast to $90 by late 2026. Oil-driven inflation contributing to stagflation concerns. U.S.-Iran talks stalling again as of late April. Tariff uncertainty and midterm election outlook also weighing on markets.
